h1.visual_description: Large serif font, left-aligned, significant top margin, used for main section titles.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized serif font, centered, used for sub-sections or thematic groupings, often includes dates in parentheses.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Emphasis on key historical figures or primary subjects.
Internal cross-reference to figures or other document elements.
Start of a figure caption, typically in bold.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Narrative citation with italicized titles (e.g., Copernicus’ De Revolutionibus)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Right-aligned footer containing Chapter name, Section number/title, and page number separated by a vertical pipe (|).
